tag.description: Message is a pre-skinned extended version of the standard JSF message component with extensions.

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: An el expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Specifies if the summary of the FacesMessage should be displayed. Default is true.
attribute.name: showSummary

attribute.description: Specifies if the detail of the FacesMessage should be displayed. Default is false.
attribute.name: showDetail

attribute.description: When true, only facesmessages with no clientIds are displayed. Default is false.
attribute.name: globalOnly

attribute.description: Defines if already rendered messages should be displayed. Default is true.
attribute.name: redisplay

attribute.description: Identifier of the component whose messages to display only, takes precendence when used with globalOnly.
attribute.name: for

attribute.description: Defines whether html would be escaped or not, defaults to true.
attribute.name: escape

attribute.description: Comma seperated list of severities to display only.
attribute.name: severity

attribute.description: Adds a close icon to hide the messages.
attribute.name: closable

attribute.description: Inline style of the component.
attribute.name: style

attribute.description: Style class of the component.
attribute.name: styleClass

attribute.description: Defines if severity icons would be displayed. Default is true.
attribute.name: showIcon

attribute.description: Type of the "for" attribute. Valid values are "key" and "expression".
attribute.name: forType

attribute.description: Añadido por Sofis: título de los mensajes simples de nivel Info.
attribute.name: singleInfoTitle

attribute.description: Añadido por Sofis: título de los mensajes simples de nivel Warn.
attribute.name: singleWarnTitle

attribute.description: Añadido por Sofis: título de los mensajes simples de nivel Error.
attribute.name: singleErrorTitle

attribute.description: Añadido por Sofis: título de los mensajes múltiples de nivel Info.
attribute.name: multiInfoTitle

attribute.description: Añadido por Sofis: título de los mensajes múltiples de nivel Warn.
attribute.name: multiWarnTitle

attribute.description: Añadido por Sofis: título de los mensajes múltiples de nivel Error.
attribute.name: multiErrorTitle

tag.description: Message is a pre-skinned extended version of the standard JSF message component with extensions.
